translation.en: I have a good ability in learning.

content.sentence: Tôi có ___ tốt trong việc học.

notes_md:
**khả năng** = ability, capability — what someone *can* do or is capable of doing.  

It’s a noun. You usually say **có khả năng + V** (have the ability to do something).  
It can talk about skills, talent, or potential in general — not just trained skills.  

It also means “possibility” in some contexts, like something might happen.  
Close word: **năng lực** (more formal, about professional competence); opposite idea: **bất lực** (powerless).

content.sentence: Tôi có ___ tốt trong việc học.

translation.en: I have a good ability in learning.

definitions.en: The capacity to do something or the power to perform.
definitions.es: La capacidad de hacer algo o el poder de realizar.
definitions.vi: Khả năng làm một điều gì đó hoặc sức mạnh để thực hiện.

example.es: Ella tiene la capacidad de hablar muchos idiomas.
example.en: She has the ability to speak many languages.
example.vi: Cô ấy có khả năng nói nhiều ngôn ngữ.

exampleSentences: Anh có khả năng học ngoại ngữ rất nhanh trong thời gian ngắn.
Chị đang rèn luyện khả năng nói trước đám đông để tự tin hơn.
Em tin rằng mọi người đều có khả năng đạt được mục tiêu của mình.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He has the ability to learn foreign languages very quickly.
She is practicing her ability to speak in public to be more confident.
I believe that everyone has the ability to achieve their goals.
notes:
khả năng = ability, capability — what someone can do or is capable of doing.  

It’s a noun. You usually say có khả năng + V (have the ability to do something).  
It can talk about skills, talent, or potential in general — not just trained skills.  

It also means “possibility” in some contexts, like something might happen.  
Close word: năng lực (more formal, about professional competence); opposite idea: bất lực (powerless).
